title: NexusOS Kernel API Reference
summary: Stable API reference for NexusOS kernel. Includes function signatures, macros, and structures for Memory Management (PMM, VMM, Heap), Hardware Abstraction (I/O, GDT, IDT/ISR, PIC), Input System (manager, events), Timer (PIT), Framebuffer, Printing (kprintf), String/Memory utils, Spinlocks, and Boot Info (Limine requests). Also includes planned APIs for Driver Interface (PnP), Virtual Filesystem (VFS, vfs_ops), and Syscalls. Agents should code against these interfaces. Phase 2 complete.

references.title: Building A Custom X64 OS - Architecture Planning
